# GitHub Project Organization

Recommended columns:

- Inbox
- Ready
- In Progress
- Review
- Blocked
- Done

Recommended milestones:

- `v0.1: Seedling`
- `v0.2: Care Logs`
- `v0.3: Reminders`
- `v0.4: Photos & Timeline`
- `v0.5: Self-Hosting`
- `v0.6: Import/Export`
- `v0.8: Household Use`
- `v1.0: Stable Release`
